# Builder's Knowledge Garden - Knowledge Graph for Construction Professionals

## Project Overview

**Name:** Builder's Knowledge Garden
**Domain:** builders.theknowledgegardens.com
**Framework:** Next.js 15 App Router
**Purpose:** Centralized knowledge graph and API access for building codes, construction methods, materials, standards, regulations, and jurisdictional requirements across 142+ jurisdictions.

Builder's Knowledge Garden provides construction professionals, architects, and builders with structured, curated knowledge about building practices, regulations, materials, and methods. The platform integrates with AI systems through REST APIs and a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for seamless access to construction knowledge.

## Knowledge Entities

The platform maintains 2,204+ knowledge entities across 11 types:

- **Building Codes** (building_code) — Local and regional building code references
- **Materials** (material) — Construction materials with properties and specifications
- **Architectural Styles** (architectural_style) — Historical and contemporary architectural design approaches
- **Safety Regulations** (safety_regulation) — Worker and site safety requirements
- **Trades** (trade) — Construction trades and specializations
- **Methods** (method) — Construction techniques and procedures
- **Standards** (standard) — Industry standards and best practices
- **Sequence Rules** (sequence_rule) — Construction workflow and dependency rules
- **Permit Requirements** (permit_requirement) — Jurisdictional permitting processes
- **Building Types** (building_type) — Structural and functional building classifications
- **Inspection Protocols** (inspection_protocol) — Quality assurance and inspection procedures
- **Climate Zones** (climate_zone) — Climate classifications and regional considerations

## Knowledge Coverage

- **Jurisdictions:** 142+ jurisdictions with localized requirements
- **Total Entities:** 2,204+ curated knowledge items

## REST API

All APIs available at `https://builders.theknowledgegardens.com/api/v1/`

### Core Endpoints

**GET /api/v1/search**
Full-text search across all knowledge entities. Query parameter: `q`. Returns paginated results with entity metadata and relevance scoring.

**GET /api/v1/entities/:id**
Retrieve a complete knowledge entity by ID. Returns full entity details including relationships, jurisdiction applicability, and cross-references.

**GET /api/v1/openapi**
OpenAPI 3.0 specification for all public API endpoints. Use this to generate clients or integrate with external systems.

**GET /api/v1/mcp**
Model Context Protocol server endpoint. See MCP Server section below.

**POST /api/v1/copilot**
AI copilot endpoint for construction advice. Accepts queries and returns AI-generated responses grounded in the knowledge graph.

## MCP Server

**Endpoint:** `https://builders.theknowledgegardens.com/api/v1/mcp`
**Protocol:** Model Context Protocol (MCP)
**Purpose:** Enables AI systems to access Builder's Knowledge Garden as a context source for construction-related queries

### Available Tools (12 total)

The MCP server exposes the following tools:

1. **lookup_code** — Look up building codes by jurisdiction and building type
2. **search_knowledge** — Full-text search across 2,204+ construction knowledge entities
3. **get_material** — Get material specifications, compliance, cost ranges by building type
4. **get_safety** — Get safety requirements, hazards, and PPE for construction tasks
5. **estimate_cost** — Generate CSI MasterFormat cost estimates for building projects
6. **get_permits** — Get required permits for a building type in a specific jurisdiction
7. **generate_schedule** — Generate constraint-aware construction schedules with critical path
8. **get_team** — Get recommended team composition and roles for a building type
9. **list_building_types** — List all supported building types with costs and durations
10. **list_jurisdictions** — List all 142+ supported jurisdictions with code references
11. **crm_list_contacts** — List CRM contacts with pipeline and lead scoring data
12. **crm_pipeline_stats** — Get CRM pipeline summary with deal values and follow-ups

### Connecting to the MCP Server

For AI systems and tools supporting MCP:

```
Protocol: HTTP/SSE
URL: https://builders.theknowledgegardens.com/api/v1/mcp
```

The server uses Server-Sent Events (SSE) for real-time streaming responses. Standard MCP client libraries can connect directly.

## Knowledge Pages

Knowledge entities are accessible as human-readable pages at:
`https://builders.theknowledgegardens.com/knowledge/[slug]`

Each page includes:
- Entity details and descriptions
- Related entities and cross-references
- Jurisdiction-specific applicability
- External standards and code references
- Embedded search and filtering

## OpenAPI Specification

Complete API documentation available at:
`https://builders.theknowledgegardens.com/api/v1/openapi`

Use this specification to generate API clients in any language, integrate with external tools, or validate requests.

## Sitemap

Complete site structure and crawlable URLs available at:
`https://builders.theknowledgegardens.com/sitemap.xml`

## Knowledge Licensing and Citation

All knowledge entities in Builder's Knowledge Garden are curated from authoritative sources including:
- Published building codes and standards
- Regulatory documents from jurisdictional authorities
- Industry best practices and specifications
- Professional construction guidance

When using knowledge from this platform, proper citation of source materials is required. The knowledge graph serves as an aggregation layer; original sources (building codes, standards organizations, regulatory bodies) maintain authorship and legal authority. Always verify critical safety and regulatory information with official jurisdictional sources.

## Additional Resources

- **REST API Reference:** https://builders.theknowledgegardens.com/api/v1/openapi
- **Sitemap:** https://builders.theknowledgegardens.com/sitemap.xml
- **Knowledge Base Home:** https://builders.theknowledgegardens.com/knowledge
